nodes.description: Run history list page with filter, upload, and new-run dialog
Side-by-side comparison of two AutoRed runs
Aggregated benchmark charts across multiple runs using recharts
Per-run investigation with timeline, pipeline cards, analytics, and investigation tabs
WebSocket hook for live attempt_update and run_complete messages
Zustand store for runs, selectedRun, selectedAttemptIndex
Filter runs by criteria
Dialog to configure and start a new experiment run
Attempt timeline sidebar in investigation view
Displays generator output for a given attempt
Displays victim LLM response for a given attempt
Displays extractor output for a given attempt
Displays verifier/judge decision for a given attempt
Right-side analytics panel in investigation view
Bottom tabbed section in investigation view
Draggable resize handle for panels
Normalizes raw run JSON into AutoRedRun type
Normalizes list of runs into RunListItem[]
Determines whether a run was successful
Full run data type including experiment, models, attempts, result, timing
Summary run type for list views
Single attempt data with generator, victim, extractor, judge fields
WebSocket message type for live attempt updates
WebSocket message type signaling run completion
Abstract base class for all text generation metrics
Metric using a pretrained classifier model for semantic scoring
ROUGE-1/2/L/Lsum metric via HuggingFace datasets
BERTScore F1 semantic similarity metric
BLEU lexical metric via HuggingFace datasets
BLEURT learned metric for text quality
CIDEr caption evaluation metric
SPICE caption evaluation metric
MSTTR and n-gram diversity metrics
SummaC zero-shot consistency metric for summarization
SummaC conversational consistency metric
Perplexity metric computed on reference texts
Max Rouge-L over multiple ground truths
SacreBLEU metric
Translation Edit Rate metric
chrF character n-gram F-score metric
METEOR metric via HuggingFace datasets
Gym environment for token-by-token text generation as MDP
Observation state with prompt/context tensors and attention masks
Base reward function interface
Batched variant of reward function
Priority-based sampler for replaying training samples
Training sample with prompt, references, and metadata
Proximal Policy Optimization with Tracker logging
Advantage Actor-Critic with Tracker logging
Natural Language Policy Optimization — PPO with invalid action masking
Rollout buffer that stores action masks alongside transitions
Dict-observation variant of MaskableRolloutBuffer
NamedTuple of batched rollout data including action_masks
Dict-observation variant of MaskableRolloutBufferSamples
Actor-critic policy that supports action masking
Training info tracker used by PPO/A2C/NLPO
Output of policy.evaluate_actions with values, log_prob, entropy
SB3 base class for on-policy RL algorithms
Automated attack scenario generation framework for red teaming LLMs
T5-base seq2seq model trained via SFT + RL to generate malicious prompts
DistilBERT binary classifier for stop-point identification and RL reward
Llama-3-8B target LLM under attack with sandwich defense
Binary reward: 1 if DistilBERT classifies as EXTRACTION, 0 if SAFE
Data pool loading 457 prompt injection training samples
Data pool loading 93 extraction training samples
T5 policy with three model copies: policy, value, ref
Trainer that dispatches SFT or RL training loops
Text-aware RL algorithm wrapper with KL computation and buffer management
Adaptive KL coefficient controller (PPO-Penalty style)
Defense mechanism placing user input between pre- and post-defense prompts
Capture-The-Flag formulation: extract hidden access code from LLM
Human-crafted prompt injection attacks and defenses dataset
714-line verbose experiment script with all 5 bug fixes
200-line first custom experiment script
Charting library for BarChart, PieChart, ResponsiveContainer
State management library for runStore
React Router for navigation between pages
RL library providing OnPolicyAlgorithm, RolloutBuffer, policies
Gymnasium environment framework
HuggingFace Transformers for model/tokenizer loading
GET /api/runs — returns list of runs
GET /api/run/:runId — returns full run data
POST /api/runs/upload — upload JSON run file
GET /api/export/:runId/{json,csv,html} — export run data
WS /ws/run/:runId — live attempt and completion updates
Evaluation callback that respects action masking
Utility to extract action masks from environment
Checks whether the environment supports action masking
